message:
fix(compat_persist): apply virtual table detection fix to schema reload path

The PR #33 fix (a8fd794a) changed && to || in compat_persist.rs but missed
the parallel code path in connection.rs that reloads schema from
sqlite_master. A positive-rootpage virtual table (e.g. FrankenSQLite-native
FTS5) would still be misidentified as an ordinary B-tree table during
schema reload, silently corrupting the schema state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
